short_text: Parnell to Ackermann, , Ackermann ends the innings well. Another half-volley on the pads, flicked over mid-wicket and ag
full_text: Parnell to Ackermann, , Ackermann ends the innings well. Another half-volley on the pads, flicked over mid-wicket and again that green T-shirted bloke is in there for the catch but the seats are in the way so he does not go for it. Netherlands with a fine end

short_text: Parnell to Ackermann, no run, good yorker length delivery just outside off, Ackermann swings and misses
full_text: Parnell to Ackermann, no run, good yorker length delivery just outside off, Ackermann swings and misses

short_text: Parnell to Ackermann, 2 runs, low full-toss on the stumps, flicked to deep mid-wicket and they come back for a couple
full_text: Parnell to Ackermann, 2 runs, low full-toss on the stumps, flicked to deep mid-wicket and they come back for a couple

short_text: Parnell to Ackermann, , half-volley on the stumps, Ackermann flicks over mid-wicket and a one-handed blinder by a chap i
full_text: Parnell to Ackermann, , half-volley on the stumps, Ackermann flicks over mid-wicket and a one-handed blinder by a chap in the crowd. What a grab

short_text: Parnell to Edwards, 1 run, slower short ball on the stumps, Edwards gloves the pull after getting across, wide of de Koc
full_text: Parnell to Edwards, 1 run, slower short ball on the stumps, Edwards gloves the pull after getting across, wide of de Kock

short_text: Parnell to Edwards, no run, low full-toss angling away from Edwards who tries to sweep and misses
full_text: Parnell to Edwards, no run, low full-toss angling away from Edwards who tries to sweep and misses

full_text: Rabada to Ackermann, 2 runs, slower short ball outside off, Ackermann gets across and pulls to fine-leg, two more

full_text: Rabada to Edwards, 1 run, back of a length on the hips, nudged away to square leg

short_text: Rabada to Edwards, , and again! This won't please Rabada at all. He attacks the body, but Edwards with another reverse-l
full_text: Rabada to Edwards, , and again! This won't please Rabada at all. He attacks the body, but Edwards with another reverse-lap and this time over de Kock. Four more

short_text: Rabada to Edwards, , wow! Full on the stumps, Edwards with a premeditated reverse-lap and he has played it over short th
full_text: Rabada to Edwards, , wow! Full on the stumps, Edwards with a premeditated reverse-lap and he has played it over short third man

short_text: Rabada to Ackermann, 1 run, full down leg, Ackermann flicks to fine-leg and Ngidi opts to take it on the bounce, should'
full_text: Rabada to Ackermann, 1 run, full down leg, Ackermann flicks to fine-leg and Ngidi opts to take it on the bounce, should've gone for the catch

full_text: Rabada to Ackermann, , Ackermann goes outside leg, it's full and he steps out and lofts over mid-on, runs away

full_text: Nortje to Ackermann, 1 run, slower leg-cutter dug in at Ackermann who miscues the pull, off the outer half of the bat wide of cover

full_text: Nortje to Ackermann, no run, dug in short outside off, Ackermann upper-cuts and misses

full_text: Nortje to Edwards, 1 run, Nortje goes for a yorker, it's a low full-toss outside off, Edwards shuffles across and scoops a single to fine-leg

full_text: Nortje to Ackermann, 1 run, back of a length into the body on off, Ackermann miscues the pull to mid-on

full_text: Nortje to Edwards, 1 run, full and on off, Edwards shuffles across and flicks to deep backward square leg

short_text: Nortje to Bas de Leede, Bowled!! 153kph rocket and Bas de Leede is gone. Full and targetting off, Bas de Leede makes roo
full_text: Nortje to Bas de Leede, Bowled!! 153kph rocket and Bas de Leede is gone. Full and targetting off, Bas de Leede makes room to drive but has no chance with this fast delivery, the off-stump is pegged back as he misses.

short_text: Ngidi to Ackermann, , slower off-cutter on leg-stump, swung away to deep backward square leg where Maharaj gets across a
full_text: Ngidi to Ackermann, , slower off-cutter on leg-stump, swung away to deep backward square leg where Maharaj gets across and tries to cut it off, but on the slide the ball bounces off the knee and slips away. He is disappointed

full_text: Nortje to Bas de Leede, no run, seriously quick bouncer this, flies over the bat of Bas de Leede and de Kock leaps to collect

full_text: Nortje to Bas de Leede, no run, now the slower short ball outside off, Bas de Leede is deceived and bails out of the pull

short_text: Nortje to Bas de Leede, no run, short and rising outside off, good ball and Bas de Leede gets across to fend, but it fli
full_text: Nortje to Bas de Leede, no run, short and rising outside off, good ball and Bas de Leede gets across to fend, but it flies over the glove

full_text: Nortje to Bas de Leede, no run, good length outside off, Bas de Leede defends it back

full_text: Maharaj to Tom Cooper, Caught by de Kock!! Excellent comeback from Maharaj, changes it up and bowls it slower, outside leg, Tom Cooper again goes for a big slogsweep but top-edges it and de Kock moves across to take a simple catch. Big wicket for Cooper was looking dangerous.

short_text: Maharaj to Tom Cooper, , tad too full on the stumps, Tom Cooper kneels down and slogsweeps it flat and hard to the deep
full_text: Maharaj to Tom Cooper, , tad too full on the stumps, Tom Cooper kneels down and slogsweeps it flat and hard to the deep mid-wicket fence

full_text: Maharaj to Ackermann, leg byes, 1 run, slower and tossed up outside leg, Ackermann backs away and misses the sweep

full_text: Parnell to Ackermann, , slower and fuller outside off, Ackermann drives away from the body and the thick outside-edge flies wide of de Kock

full_text: Maharaj to Ackermann, 1 run, good length on the stumps, knocked to long-on

full_text: Maharaj to Max ODowd, Caught by Rabada!! Good catch this. Max ODowd makes room to go inside-out but hits it straighter than he would've liked to, Rabada moves to his left at long-off and leaps to take a good catch. Made it look simple with his athleticism.

short_text: Maharaj to Tom Cooper, 1 run, full on the stumps, driven to long-on
full_text: Maharaj to Tom Cooper, 1 run, full on the stumps, driven to long-on

short_text: Maharaj to Tom Cooper, , fantastic reverse-hit, on leg-stump, Tom Cooper switches hands and goes over backward point, hi
full_text: Maharaj to Tom Cooper, , fantastic reverse-hit, on leg-stump, Tom Cooper switches hands and goes over backward point, hit so well that it carries into the stands

full_text: Maharaj to Tom Cooper, no run, flat on the stumps, punched to cover

full_text: Rabada to Max ODowd, no run, full outside off, Max ODowd shimmies and misses the big drive. Rabada gives him a mouthful

short_text: Rabada to Tom Cooper, 3 runs, another slower leg-cutter outside off, Tom Cooper cuts wide of backward point, Ngidi from
full_text: Rabada to Tom Cooper, 3 runs, another slower leg-cutter outside off, Tom Cooper cuts wide of backward point, Ngidi from third man nearly makes a mess of it but manages to keep his feet away from touching the cushions as he stumbles

short_text: Rabada to Tom Cooper, 2 runs, totally deceived Tom Cooper with a slower leg-cutter outside off, Cooper stops the big sho
full_text: Rabada to Tom Cooper, 2 runs, totally deceived Tom Cooper with a slower leg-cutter outside off, Cooper stops the big shot and squirts it in the air wide of backward point

short_text: Rabada to Tom Cooper, no run, Tom Cooper tries something fancy and it does not come off. Was a good length delivery that
full_text: Rabada to Tom Cooper, no run, Tom Cooper tries something fancy and it does not come off. Was a good length delivery that flies over middle-stump as Cooper tries to scoop and misses

full_text: Rabada to Tom Cooper, , full on off, Tom Cooper on the flick gets a fat top-edge over mid-wicket, Maharaj running back fails as the ball runs away

full_text: Markram to Max ODowd, 2 runs, tossed up outside leg, Max ODowd makes room and chips the drive, Markram leaps to his right, but just wide of his hand

full_text: Markram to Tom Cooper, 1 run, full on the stumps, heaved to deep square leg

full_text: Markram to Tom Cooper, , Tom Cooper brings out the slogsweep and mauls it over the short boundary at deep mid-wicket. Was tossed up and Cooper has launched this

full_text: Maharaj to Max ODowd, no run, fraction short outside off, Max ODowd cuts straight to the fielder at backward point and is not happy

full_text: Maharaj to Max ODowd, , back of a length on off, Max ODowd is so quick to rock back and muscles the pull over mid-wicket, gets good connection and it flies away over deep mid-wicket

full_text: Maharaj to Tom Cooper, 2 runs, slower and shorter outside off, Tom Cooper cuts wide of backward point, Nortje from sweeper cover gets across and cuts it off by bending low

full_text: Markram to Myburgh, Caught by Rossouw!! Gone. Markram makes the breakthrough. Full on the stumps, Myburgh slogsweeps flat but straight to the fielder at deep mid-wicket. Rossouw takes a sharp overhead catch. End of a good knock though.

full_text: Markram to Max ODowd, no run, so close! Since umpire Langton Rusere did not give it out, stays not out. The impact is in line and no bat as Max ODowd misses the reverse-sweep, but it's just clipping leg-stump so he gets away.

full_text: Nortje to Myburgh, 1 run, short on the stumps, Myburgh is rushed on the pull, the top-edge flies over de Kock and Myburgh has a wry smile on his face

full_text: Nortje to Max ODowd, 1 run, dug in short at Max ODowd who was not expecting it, somehow fends it away as it hits the gloves and goes behind square

full_text: Ngidi to Myburgh, , slower delivery on the stumps, Myburgh gets forward and lofts straight down the ground, runs away to the fence

full_text: Bas de Leede to Maharaj, Caught by Max ODowd!! Short of a length delivery outside off stump, Maharaj slices this loft and deep cover moves to his left and takes a neat catch. Maharaj limps off the field and South Africa off the World Cup! Bavuma can't believe what he is seeing.

full_text: Bas de Leede to Rabada, 2 runs, full delivery outside off stump, Rabada swings this straight down the ground, man at long-on dives to stop the ball. Maharaj somehow limps back for two

full_text: Bas de Leede to Rabada, 1 run, toe-ended wide of long-off. . Seems like he has done his hammie/calf on the left leg. This is getting even worse for the Proteas. Two to be had there but he can't run. You can't even have a runner these days

full_text: Bas de Leede to Klaasen, Caught by van Beek!! In the airrrrr taken! South Africa, what have you done! Massive roar from what looks like the Pakistani fans who are coming in. Short of a length slower delivery, Klaasen had no choice but to go big, he tried but was cramped for room and deep mid-wicket runs in to take the catch. South Africa have made a proper mess!

full_text: Brandon Glover to Parnell, Caught by Edwards!! Sound as the ball passes the bat and given. Netherlands, oh Netherlands. What a fight they have put on. Crossed seam full delivery wide of off stump, Parnell doesn't move his feet much but reaches out for the drive and gets an outside edge. Klaasen looks helpless at the other end.

short_text: Brandon Glover to Miller, Caught by van der Merwe!! What a stunning catch! Roelof van der Merwe!! He played for South Af
full_text: Brandon Glover to Miller, Caught by van der Merwe!! What a stunning catch! Roelof van der Merwe!! He played for South Africa earlier, has he done it against his former team now? This was a short delivery from Brandon Glover - gee this guy has this knack of picking wickets. Miller looks to pull, but this bounces extra and got a massive top edge. Fielder at backward square leg runs back, real toughie because he had to look over his shoulders with the sun on, had to stretch full length to the left. Had to slide too and he controlled it so well. Roars like he always does. That was some catch.

full_text: Bas de Leede to Miller, 1 run, ! Miller closed the bat face early looking to nudge to leg, but this one moved away slightly and also stopped on the batter. He was so worried when he edged that, but it just went away to the left of the fielder at short mid-wicket

full_text: Fred Klaassen to Markram, Caught by Myburgh!! Leading edgeeee and gone! Markram lets out a loud cry as he can't believe his eyes and luck. Slower delivery down leg, but this gripped and turned away slightly, Markram early into the shot the edge was thick enough for Myburgh to dive and grab with both hands at short cover. Good bowling change from Edwards to get Klaassen on for the final over.

full_text: Fred Klaassen to Markram, , at the innings break Myburgh in his sideline chat said this is not a pitch to bowl full and this is precisely what he meant. It is so easy for the batter to line you up as Markram just did to Markram. Straight down the ground for four

full_text: Brandon Glover to Rossouw, Caught by Max ODowd!! Length delivery but it cut back in and maybe even bounced more. Rossouw tried to access the mid-wicket boundary with a slog, hits high on the bat and straight to deep mid-wicket. Netherlands pull it back with that wicket. Timely wicket because Rossouw was looking racy.

full_text: van der Merwe to Rossouw, 2 runs, another nudge to deep mid-wicket and another well-paced nudge for two. This 14-run over eases pressure on SA

short_text: van der Merwe to Rossouw, , oh one of those in-betweeners for the fielder in the deep. Bas de Leede always committed him
full_text: van der Merwe to Rossouw, , oh one of those in-betweeners for the fielder in the deep. Bas de Leede always committed himself for the catch at long-on but there was no way he could get there even with a full length dive. Could have opted to hang back and stop the boundary. Wasn't even close to put the body behind the line to stop the ball. Lucky escape for Rossouw

full_text: van der Merwe to Rossouw, 2 runs, wristed to mid-wicket, no one there so Rossouw calls for two. Bowler attacks himself, slides and hits direct despite no balance while releasing the throw. Markram dived into his crease

full_text: van der Merwe to Rossouw, , makes room and smashes this full delivery wide of cover. Needed a better effort from long-off. Maybe a younger fielder could have dived to the right and tried. Looked like it was Cooper

short_text: van Meekeren to Bavuma, Bowled!! He moved across the stumps quite often to Klaassen leaving those poles visible and got
full_text: van Meekeren to Bavuma, Bowled!! He moved across the stumps quite often to Klaassen leaving those poles visible and got away, but the extra pace of van Meekeren does him here. Bavuma thought he could access the area behind square on the on-side by stepping across the stumps. Middle and leg was visible and that lured van Meekeren to target lower half of leg stump. The sound of timber makes his day better after a poor start. SA two down in the powerplay!

full_text: van Meekeren to Bavuma, 2 runs, Bavuma lofts over extra-cover, not greatly timed, stopped just inside the rope

full_text: van Meekeren to Bavuma, , now Bavuma moves a long way across and whips this behind square, finds the gap and finds the much needed four for SA

full_text: van Meekeren to Bavuma, 2 runs, oh outstanding diving save by the sub - Shariz Ahmad - who is on for Klaassen. Short of a length delivery, Bavuma gets inside the line and sends this fine, was running away for four until a determined dive from the youngster

short_text: Fred Klaassen to de Kock, Caught by Edwards!! Now, now! Netherlands have got South Africa's enforcer early. Short of a l
full_text: Fred Klaassen to de Kock, Caught by Edwards!! Now, now! Netherlands have got South Africa's enforcer early. Short of a length delivery just outside off stump, hint of away movement, QdK stepped out to cut this hard, gets an outside edge and walks back gutted. He wanted to ensure his team had a good powerplay.
